heading: Work-life policies and programs
label: 2901 Work-life policies and programs
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2901 was renumbered .section 5101 of this title
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 531 of this title

children.text: to establish an office for the purpose of developing, promulgating, and coordinating policies, programs, and activities related to the families of Coast Guard members;
to implement and oversee policies, programs, and activities described in paragraph (1) as the Commandant considers necessary; and
to perform such other duties as the Commandant considers necessary.
